title: Build MAP Context System (formalize context packets, budgets, compression)
description: Per Guidelines/MAP_repo_systems_gap_review.md priority #3: promote notes/context-routing-guide.md and shared/memory-map.md into a formal Context System defining context packet format, required/optional context by task type, forbidden context loading, stale-context handling, token-budget rules, local-summarizer role, and context compression rules. Build MAP_System/CONTEXT_SYSTEM.md and templates/CONTEXT_PACKET_TEMPLATE.md. Must cross-link Research System (context includes verified Research Summaries, not raw sourcing), Self-Repair (stale context is a DRIFT-class repair target), Emergence (insights inform what belongs in a context packet), HPOM (local-summarizer tier boundary), and Memory (memory-map.md as the source of what's canonical). Do not duplicate context-routing-guide.md's situational routing table; formalize the rules around it and link to it. Register all output_paths upfront including any cross-linked file edits (lesson from TASK-103/105 review cycles).
acceptance_criteria: MAP_System/CONTEXT_SYSTEM.md exists and defines context packet format, required/optional context by task type, forbidden context loading, stale-context handling, token-budget rules, local-summarizer role, and context compression rules
CONTEXT_SYSTEM.md cross-links notes/context-routing-guide.md, shared/memory-map.md, RESEARCH_SYSTEM.md, SELF_REPAIR_SYSTEM.md, and emergence/README.md
shared/decisions.md gets a new DECISION entry recording Context System adoption
events/events.jsonl has PROGRESS/SUBMISSION entries tracing the build
